textByHashes.b60e92b0c91955fa3e5802d827673ba07c017e3c: If you'd like to see someone fighting Zulrah, feel free to borrow my telescope.
textByHashes.d0da5ef57046f0e1cda9fffa693df7f62c76eb90: Zulrah, the giant snake. Its lair is deep in the swamp, so I've set up a telescope so I can watch people fighting it.
